title: Sprout & Swap
description: Full-stack Next.js 14 App Router experience for managed kids’ clothing resale: parents drop off clothes, warehouse inspects/listed items, buyers purchase, and sellers are paid via Stripe while the platform orchestrates everything.
auth: Next.js 14 + TypeScript + TailwindCSS for responsive UI and layout components. NextAuth v4 with CredentialsProvider for buyer/seller/admin login plus role-aware session guards
sell: Seller landing page + bag submission workflow so parents can ship clothing for intake
dashboard: Buyer or seller dashboards for profiles, orders, and future payouts
payments: Stripe checkout for buyers and seller payout tracking
inventory: MongoDB + Mongoose models (InventoryItem, Product, Order, OrderItem, Payout) capture the lifecycle
media: Cloudinary handles clothing photography and image delivery
backend: Next.js API routes/middleware with MongoDB connection helpers and centralized auth
